channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Rubio denies Trump considered personal finances in Iran decisions
item.description: Secretary of State Rubio calls allegations that Trump weighed personal finances in Iran decisions "completely false" during a House hearing.

item.title: Comer says Medicaid fraud probe will expand to more states
item.description: House Oversight Chairman James Comer told Newsmax that investigators are preparing to broaden their examination of Medicaid fraud.

item.title: Rubio criticizes Ted Lieu over conspiracy theories about Trump
John Cornyn's post about Texas Senate race draws attention
